title: Add AI venue summary field
description: Add an MVP venue summary that explains why a venue is trending based on available social proof and trend score data.
acceptance_criteria: Backend response includes an ai_summary field for map venue results when summary data is available
Summary generation logic is isolated from ingestion, scoring, and HTTP handler code
Frontend displays the summary in the venue preview or detail surface
No delivery, cart, order, payment, or booking logic is added
Relevant tests are added or updated when possible
